title: Time Tracking
excerpt: Hi, I am trying the built in Time Tracking. It is working okay, but when I archive a task, the time disappears from the widget that records time. I asked the chat bot if that was supposed to happen and they said no. Anyo…

posts.author: davidwes (David)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I am trying the built in Time Tracking. It is working okay, but when I archive a task, the time disappears from the widget that records time. I asked the chat bot if that was supposed to happen and they said no. Anyone else have this?
